name: gtm-ontology-framework
description: GTM Ontology Framework plugins — build agent-ready business ontologies of your CRM/GTM stack.

plugins.name: gtm-ontology-builder
plugins.description: Build an agent-ready business ontology for GTM systems (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Attio, Salesforce, email marketing, ERP): objects, custom fields, pipelines, automations, agent actions, and KPIs as a 4-layer machine-readable model. Bundles the renderer, JSON schemas, and a complete worked example.
